infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The camera is used to take photos of incidents (for example, a fire or road accident) so you can attach the image to your incident report and submit it in the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: The photo library is used to select existing photos (for example, a hazard photo you took earlier) so you can attach the image to your incident report and submit it in the app.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: The photo library is used to save images related to your reports (for example, a copy of the photo submitted with an incident) so you can reference them later.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used when you create an incident so the report includes the approximate incident position (for example, where an accident or fire happened) in the app.
